title: microgramma brunei
intro: Microgramma brunei is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly known as a type of fern. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microgramma brunei include reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being, with some studies suggesting it may have potential in treating conditions such as arthritis and cancer. Herbal preparations of Microgramma brunei are typically made by drying and crushing the leaves, which can then be steeped in hot water to make a tea or infused in oil to create a topical treatment.
